summary: Iteration 29: Testing UI fixes for Loading Type container styling and Dental Chart centering in Add Implant modal. UI Fix 1 PASSES visually. UI Fix 2 has an ISSUE - vertical centering not applied. Regression test for 45 implant systems PASSES.

ui_bugs.issue: Dental chart content is NOT vertically centered in Add Implant modal. Content appears at TOP with large empty space below. The ScrollView is missing style={{ flex: 1 }} which is required for contentContainerStyle centering to work.
ui_bugs.fix_suggestion: Add style={{ flex: 1 }} to the ScrollView component at line 331: <ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }} contentContainerStyle={ms.scroll}>

action_items: Fix UI Fix 2 - Add style={{ flex: 1 }} to ScrollView in ImplantPlanModal to enable vertical centering. Current code at line 331: <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={ms.scroll}> should be: <ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }} contentContainerStyle={ms.scroll}>
critical_code_review_comments: CaseImplantPlanning.tsx line 331: ScrollView missing flex: 1 style. For contentContainerStyle justifyContent: center to work, the ScrollView needs style={{ flex: 1 }} to expand to fill available space.

success_rate.frontend: 66% - UI Fix 1 passes, UI Fix 2 fails (centering not applied)

context_for_next_testing_agent: UI Fix 1 (Loading Type Container) passes - the container is visually distinct with border and grey background, chips have white background. UI Fix 2 (Dental Chart Centering) FAILS - the content is at top of modal not centered. The issue is in line 331 of CaseImplantPlanning.tsx - ScrollView needs style={{ flex: 1 }} for centering to work. Regression test for 45 implant systems passes.

UI_Fix_1_Loading_Type_Container.description: Loading Type container on New Case form has visible border, grey background (#F4F6F8), and chips with white background for contrast

UI_Fix_2_Dental_Chart_Centering.description: Dental chart in Add Implant modal is NOT vertically centered - appears at TOP with empty space below
UI_Fix_2_Dental_Chart_Centering.root_cause: ScrollView at line 331 is missing style={{ flex: 1 }}. Without this, the ScrollView doesn't expand to fill available space, so contentContainerStyle centering doesn't work.
UI_Fix_2_Dental_Chart_Centering.fix_required: Change line 331 from <ScrollView contentContainerStyle={ms.scroll}> to <ScrollView style={{ flex: 1 }} contentContainerStyle={ms.scroll}>

Regression_45_Implant_Systems.description: API returns exactly 45 implant systems and UI dropdown shows (45)

flows_tested: Navigate to Implant Selection tab - verify 45 systems in dropdown
Navigate to My Cases > Phase2 Test procedure
